_comment: Start pool for Heng Yue Sect main complex. Uses the custom main_hall NBT — the sect's central building where the Sect Master addresses disciples, promotions are announced, and major gatherings occur. Canon: this is the heart of Heng Yue Sect where Wang Lin spent his outer-disciple years. Replaces the vanilla plains_meeting_point placeholder (Article XXII: every canon entry must become gameplay).
name: ergenverse:heng_yue_sect/start_pool
